questions.question: Describe the three main components of the environment and their interrelation. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Biophysical environment, Human environment, and Ecological environment

questions.question: What is the role of the biophysical environment in the ecosystem? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Biophysical environment provides physical conditions necessary for life such as water, air, and minerals

questions.question: Explain the concept of ecological environment and its significance in sustainability. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Ecological environment refers to the interaction between living organisms and their physical environment, essential for maintaining ecosystem balance and sustainability
